message:
chore: update beads config and clean up Cargo.lock dependencies

- Update .beads/.gitignore for local issue tracking
- Clean up Cargo.lock removing 516 unused transitive dependencies

This reduces build complexity by trimming the dependency graph.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -44,3 +44,6 @@ sync_base.jsonl
 # contributors to accidentally commit upstream issue databases.
 # The JSONL files (issues.jsonl, interactions.jsonl) and config files
 # are tracked by git by default since no pattern above ignores them.
+
+# Local history backups
+.br_history/
